Title: American Dad!
Writer: Mike Barker, Seth MacFarlane, Matt Weitzman
Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Plot: The escapades of Stan Smith, a conservative C.I.A. Agent dealing with family life, while keeping America safe.
Awards: Nominated for 4 Primetime Emmys. 1 win & 33 nominations total
